title: PoIBreach
description: Proof-of-Breach declaration (spec §8). Filed when an agent's actual action deviates materially from a registered PoIIntent. Court-admissible when anchored to a registryEntryId with a valid XRPL timestamp.

intentId.description: The id of the original PoIIntent that was breached.

registryEntryId.description: The registry entry id from the intent registry (contains XRPL anchor txHash).

filedBy.description: XRPL r-address or DID of the party filing the breach claim.

filedAt.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when this breach was filed.

deviation.description: Structured comparison of declared vs actual values.

declared.description: The declared value from the original PoIIntent.

actual.description: The observed value from the on-chain or API record.

deviationMagnitude.description: For numeric deviations: |actual - declared| / declared (0–1 = percentage deviation).

evidence.description: Chain of evidence supporting the breach claim.

ref.description: XRPL tx hash, URL, or content-addressed hash of the evidence artifact.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical JSON of this document (excluding this field), base64url-encoded.
